generated_exposure.exposure_text:
🇺🇸 'Stronger Together': Why Strategic Autonomy is Making Us Less Safe

As a concerned citizen, I've been watching our national security discussions closely. While the idea of 'strategic autonomy' sounds appealing, we're seeing real consequences. Our European allies are struggling to maintain defense capabilities when they go it alone. Remember the 2025 Baltic incident? Local forces were overwhelmed until NATO reinforcements arrived. This isn't about being dependent - it's about being smart. Our alliances give us leverage and shared burden. Let's not weaken what's keeping us safe. #NationalSecurity #StrongerTogether
